title: Syncing My Work tasks to Apple Reminders?
excerpt:

posts.author: TheBox (Mark )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello All!

Currently, I use Apple Reminders as my daily “to-do” application for mostly personal tasks. We also have a ton of task automation within our Monday setup that populates to “My Work” within Monday. It would be awesome if there was a way for those tasks to push to the Apple Reminders so that everything is all in the same place.

Are there any solutions to accomplish this? Thank you!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @TheBox!

We currently don’t offer a native integration/sync with apple reminders, so would advise looking into third party applications that might help you achieve this. Alternatively, you can set up notifications on your iOS device for your monday.com reminders if this helps?
